categories.summary: The discussion centered on the announcement of Eliza's launch of the first economic agent launchpad called 'waifu'. satsbased shared that Sol the architect and an Eliza agent were the primary builders of this launchpad platform. The announcement was accompanied by a link to a Twitter/X post providing more details about the launch. This represents a significant milestone in economic agent infrastructure, combining AI agent capabilities with a launchpad mechanism for deployment.

actionItems.description: Economic agent launchpad 'waifu' launched by Eliza, built by Sol the architect and Eliza agent
